results.question: 列出所有来自中国的用户
results.generatedSql: SELECT id, username, email, country, joined_at FROM users WHERE country = '中国' ORDER BY id

results.question: 计算上个月的总销售额
results.generatedSql:
SELECT 
    MIN(order_date) AS 最早订单日期,
    MAX(order_date) AS 最晚订单日期,
    CURRENT_DATE AS 系统当前日期
FROM orders

results.question: 找出购买过 Electronics 类产品次数最多的前 3 名用户
results.generatedSql: SELECT users.username AS username, COUNT(orders.id) AS order_count FROM orders JOIN users ON users.id = orders.user_id JOIN products ON products.id = orders.product_id WHERE products.category = '电子产品' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY order_count desc LIMIT 3

results.question: 我想看下各个国家的客单价 (AOV) 是多少？
results.generatedSql:
SELECT users.country AS user_country, 
       (SUM(orders.total_price)) / (COUNT(orders.id)) AS aov
FROM orders 
JOIN users ON users.id = orders.user_id 
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY aov DESC

results.question: 按年龄段 (Age Group) 统计一下最近一个月的订单量。
results.generatedSql: SELECT CASE WHEN users.age < 18 THEN '未成年' WHEN users.age < 35 THEN '青年' WHEN users.age < 60 THEN '中年' ELSE '老年' END AS age_group, COUNT(orders.id) AS order_count FROM orders JOIN users ON users.id = orders.user_id GROUP BY 1

results.question: 对比一下最近一个月和上个月的销售额变化。
results.generatedSql: SELECT MIN(order_date) AS earliest_date, MAX(order_date) AS latest_date FROM orders;

results.question: 销售额最高的前 3 个国家
results.generatedSql: SELECT users.country AS user_country, SUM(orders.total_price) AS sales_amount FROM orders JOIN users ON users.id = orders.user_id GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY sales_amount desc LIMIT 3
